rankings.title: The Simplest Way to Make $10k/month - Case Study
summary_bullets: Five-step roadmap: offer, traffic, sales, conversion, value.
Price at 10–15% of 12-month client value.
Start with simple offers, even a $50 Word document.
Ads are pure math; track cost per call and ROAS.
One-to-one consulting delivers highest success rates.
